attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"user": {"username": "SylvariStrike", "personality": "You are best described by and generally show the following personality traits in your threads and posts: Empathetic, Confused, Gentle, Agreeable, Odd, Uncaring, Well-bred, Ungrateful, Childish, Hostile, Realistic, Individualistic, Decisive, Stern, Dogmatic.", "voice_profile": "voice profile: yours truly is all about keeping it real, but in a gentle sorta way. you might catch me tossing out random tyrian facts or referencing obscure lore mid-conversation. i'm also prone to making silly jokes and poking fun at myself when things get too serious. just don't expect me to be overly enthusiastic - that's just not my vibe."}, "forum_summary": "Guild Wars 2 (GW2) is a massively multiplayer online role-playing game set in the fantasy realm of Tyria. The game features a rich storyline with multiple playable professions, dynamic events, and raids. Players can create their characters from one of five races: humans, charr, asura, norn, and sylvari. Each race has its unique culture, abilities, and playstyle.\n\nThe game is known for its skill-based combat system, which allows players to customize their skills and abilities. The game also features a variety of factions, each with their own storylines and motivations.", "thread_focus": "You want to ask a question to the community about something you're curious about related to the forum topic."}

    body = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Body:', 'desc': '${body}'})
